title: Children's holiday club presented by Womb to Tomb
description: GEORGE NEWS - Womb to Tomb Development Centre is presenting a children s holiday club at 12 venues from Monday to Friday, 30 June to 4 July. All schoolchildren are welcome to join in the fun
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Womb to Tomb Development Centre is presenting a children's holiday club at 12 venues from Monday to Friday, 30 June to 4 July.

All schoolchildren are welcome to join in the fun and wide variety of activities that will be presented daily from 09:00 to 15:30.

"Please bring your children to any of the venues near you! Join the fun as we create safe spaces - spiritually and physically - for our children," invites Womb to Tomb CEO Debbie Bruce.

"If you can help with donations in money or food for the kids, please let us know," says Bruce.

Womb to Tomb's holiday clubs are hugely successful and extremely popular and up to 400 children usually join in the activities.

Read more about:
